g.text: Milestone Index — Build Your Own SQLite
M2 | build-sqlite-m2 | SQL Parser and AST (parser.h, parser.c)
M3 | build-sqlite-m3 | VDBE Bytecode Compiler and VM (vdbe.h, vdbe.c)
M4 | build-sqlite-m4 | Buffer Pool Manager (buffer_pool.h, buffer_pool.c)
M5 | build-sqlite-m5 | B-tree Page Format and Table Storage (btree.h, btree.c)
M6 | build-sqlite-m6 | SELECT Execution and DML with three-valued logic
M8 | build-sqlite-m8 | Query Planner and Statistics (planner.h, planner.c)
M9 | build-sqlite-m9 | Transactions and Rollback Journal (transaction.h, transaction.c)
ENC | varint 1-9 bytes | SQLite Base-128 variable-length int
EXECUTION ENGINE — VDBE COMPILER + VIRTUAL MACHINE
struct | columns, table, where, order, limit
emit(c, op, p1, p2, p3, cmt)
leaf_split(bp, lid, cell, len, rid, res)
planner_join_order_dp(db, tables, n, jp, fp, out)
